issue.title: subrange should prevent slicing for contiguous iterators

discussion.p: Currently, the subrange uses the following exposition-only concept:

blockquote.pre: template<class From, class To> concept uses-nonqualification-pointer-conversion = // exposition only is_pointer_v<From> && is_pointer_v<To> && !convertible_to<remove_pointer_t<From>(*)[], remove_pointer_t<To>(*)[]>;

discussion.p: to disallow derived to base conversions. However, this only applies to pointers.
Given that subrange is intended to universally take any iterator-pair to form a view, we may need to generally prevent this in the case of contiguous iterators (demo):
